<section class="cards-grid cards-grid--top">
  <article class="info-card">
    <div class="card-headline">
      <i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i>
      <h3>Course content</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="card-content">
      <p>
        Open Science in the Swedish context is designed to teach DDLS research
        school scientists how to apply Swedish Open Science standards in their
        daily research.
      </p>
      <p>
        The course covers key stages of the research lifecycle, from planning
        and publication to sharing results, to license communication and
        responsible archiving.
      </p>
    </div>
  </article>

  <article class="info-card">
    <div class="card-headline">
      <i class="bi bi-bullseye"></i>
      <h3>Learning outcomes</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="card-content">
      <ol>
        <li>
          Get acquainted with Open Science principles and how they are
          implemented in the Swedish context.
        </li>
        <li>
          Develop a foundational understanding of how to apply Open Science
          principles across key stages of a research project.
        </li>
        <li>
          Identify practical next steps to improve openness in your own work.
        </li>
      </ol>
    </div>
  </article>

  <article class="info-card">
    <div class="card-headline">
      <i class="bi bi-grid-1x2"></i>
      <h3>Topics covered</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="card-content">
      <ul>
        <li>
          Learning principles and why they apply to training and teaching.
        </li>
        <li>
          Designing and planning sessions, course materials, and feedback
          loops.
        </li>
        <li>
          Teaching techniques to enhance learner engagement and participation.
        </li>
        <li>Assessment, maintenance, and continuous improvement.</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </article>

  <article class="info-card">
    <div class="card-headline">
      <i class="bi bi-tag"></i>
      <h3>Keywords</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="card-content">
      <ul>
        <li>Open Science</li>
        <li>FAIR</li>
        <li>Reproducibility</li>
        <li>Data stewardship</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </article>
</section>
